# OMA Townhouse

> Off-plan townhouse investment in Kaba Kaba, Tabanan, Bali. Freehold via PT PMA and 25 or 40 year leasehold options, in a rice field setting about 25 minutes from Canggu and 10 to 15 minutes from Nuanu and the coast.

## Key facts

- Location: Kaba Kaba, Tabanan, Bali, Indonesia (about 25 minutes from Canggu)
- Product: off-plan townhouse with private pool and modern tropical design
- Ownership: freehold via PT PMA, plus 25 year and 40 year leasehold options
- Pricing: 25 year leasehold from 115,000 USD, 40 year leasehold from 161,000 USD, freehold from 265,000 USD (standard prices up to 310,000 USD)
- Land prices in the area run up to 70 percent below Canggu
- Distances: Nuanu and Luna Beach Club 10 to 15 minutes, Kedungu Beach 10 to 15 minutes, Pererenan 20 to 25 minutes, central Canggu about 25 minutes

## Topics covered

- Buying off-plan property in Bali and how the area compares to Canggu
- Freehold (PT PMA) versus leasehold for foreign buyers
- Rental yield and capital appreciation prospects in Tabanan
- Living in Kaba Kaba: gyms, cafes, beach clubs, wellness, schools and healthcare nearby
- Development driving the area: Nuanu Creative City and incoming hotel brands such as Alila

## Notes

- Pricing and yield figures are a guide and ranges, not guarantees or financial advice. Confirm current details with the OMA Townhouse team.
